must_do.full_text:
$920M for 110k GPUs
Google is paying $11.6/hr for Blackwells
must_do.summary: Google采购11万块Blackwell GPU，单位成本$11.6/小时，AI芯片采购规模数据。
angles: Google砸9.2亿美元买11万块GPU，AI军备竞赛升级
Blackwell芯片成本曝光：每小时$11.6，谷歌的AI野心
AI芯片价格战：Google采购规模刷新纪录

must_do.full_text: With Design Mode, you can now point, draw, or talk to update your UI. https://t.co/Bug3p7cVyI
must_do.summary: Cursor AI推出Design Mode功能，支持指点、绘画、语音三种方式更新UI。产品交互方式创新，降低开发门槛。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：新功能首次发布
反常识：语音/绘画更新UI的交互创新
angles: Cursor AI新功能：指点、画画、说话就能改UI
终于来了！AI编辑器支持语音绘画交互设计
开发者福音：Cursor Design Mode让UI编辑像玩游戏一样简单

must_do.full_text: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang: "We are manufacturing in America because of President Trump. We're now manufacturing the most advanced chips for AI here in the U.S. All of this started with President Trump wanting to re-industrialize the U.S." https://t.co/08ywLgj4UO
must_do.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋表示，因特朗普政策推动，英伟达在美国制造最先进的AI芯片。这反映了美国芯片产业政策与全球AI竞争格局的新变化。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性（政治人物与科技CEO的政策关联）
angles: 英伟达CEO首次公开：特朗普政策如何改变芯片产业格局
震撼｜最先进AI芯片现在在美国造，背后是这个政治决定
黄仁勋亲述：为什么英伟达选择在美国制造AI芯片

must_do.full_text:
Google releases Gemma 4 QAT. ✨
You can now run Gemma 4 at 3x less memory with near original performance.

Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) makes it possible to run Gemma 4 26B-A4B on 16GB RAM.

GGUFs: https://t.co/wQgEocxUId
QAT Guide: https://t.co/Nsm1yeGEHx https://t.co/34d6Dxs8mJ
must_do.summary: Google发布Gemma 4 QAT量化版本，内存占用降低3倍，26B模型可在16GB RAM运行。开发者友好的高效AI模型方案。
angles: Google Gemma 4 QAT：3倍省内存的量化方案
26B大模型跑进16GB笔记本，开发者福音
量化训练新时代：如何让AI模型更轻更快

must_do.full_text:
Ok, it’s probably about time we changed the game.

Stay tuned  👀 https://t.co/50PHNRJB0i
must_do.summary: NotebookLM官方预告：「是时候改变游戏规则了」，暗示重大功能更新即将发布。强烈的悬念感和期待感。
angles: NotebookLM要改变游戏规则？官方预告解读
AI笔记工具大战升级：NotebookLM新功能曝光
深夜突发：NotebookLM重大更新即将来临

must_do.full_text:
Draft it. Tweak it. Send it.

You can now send emails directly from writing blocks in ChatGPT on the web, without leaving the conversation. https://t.co/GoQtlSFGFG
must_do.summary: ChatGPT新增邮件发送功能，用户可在对话中直接草稿、编辑并发送邮件，无需切换应用。提升写作到发送的工作流效率。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：ChatGPT首次集成邮件发送功能
angles: ChatGPT终于支持直接发邮件，一键完成草稿→发送
AI写作工具进化：从对话到邮件发送的完整闭环
OpenAI新功能解析：ChatGPT如何重塑办公效率

must_do.full_text: We doubled Claude Cowork usage limits for the next month. This applies to your 5-hr rate limits. If you’ve been saving up a big messy project, now’s the time.
must_do.summary: Anthropic宣布在下个月内将Claude Cowork的5小时速率限制翻倍。这是对Claude用户的直接产品更新。
angles: Claude Cowork限制翻倍！大项目终于能跑了

下个月内速率限制翻倍，这个时间窗口别错过

must_do.full_text:
Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia:

"Every engineer is going to have and manage hundreds of agents."

The most valuable engineering skill of 2026 is not taught in any university.

No CS program teaches harness engineering.
No bootcamp teaches agent memory architecture.
No degree https://t.co/FDWYEggCJk
must_do.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋：2026年最有价值的工程技能是「代理工程」，大学和培训班都不教。揭示AI时代工程教育的巨大信息差。
angles: 黄仁勋预言：2026年最值钱的技能大学教不了
代理工程崛起：AI时代的新职业密码
为什么CS学位可能过时了？

must_do.full_text:
New Anthropic Science Blog: Making Claude a chemist.

To manipulate a molecule, chemists first need to understand its structure. Their main tool is NMR spectroscopy.

We found Opus 4.7 matches—and on some tasks beats—dedicated NMR software. Read more: https://t.co/1jUvz7wdhV
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布科学博客：Claude Opus 4.7在NMR光谱分析中匹配甚至超越专业软件，展示AI在化学领域的突破应用。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：AI首次在专业科学工具上超越专业软件
反常识：通用AI模型击败垂直专业工具
angles: Claude终于成为化学家：Opus 4.7击败专业NMR软件
AI叙事｜通用模型如何超越专业工具的
化学领域新突破：Claude在分子结构分析上的实战对标

must_do.full_text:
Suddenly it hit me.

What happened to DeepSeek?
Sora?
GitHub Copilot?
Llama?
Cursor?
Perplexity?

What happened?
must_do.summary: 用户质疑DeepSeek、Sora、GitHub Copilot、Llama、Cursor、Perplexity等热门AI产品为何突然消失在讨论中，引发对AI热度周期的思考。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：热门产品突然消失的现象
angles: AI产品生命周期：为什么热门工具突然被遗忘
反思：DeepSeek到Perplexity，我们的AI焦虑在循环
AI热度轮转背后：新鲜感消退vs真实价值

must_do.full_text:
Jensen Huang, da NVIDIA, é provavelmente um dos personagens mais descolados do setor. Na China, quando participou do encontro entre Trump e Xi Jinping, ele foi visto andando pelas ruas e comendo noodles no meio da multidão.

A empresa que ele lidera tem uma capitalização bolsista
must_do.summary: 黄仁勋人物故事：Nvidia CEO在中国参加Trump-Xi会晤期间街头吃面，展现亲民形象，非AI产品内容。
angles: 黄仁勋在中国：Trump-Xi会晤间隙街头吃面的Nvidia CEO
芯片教父的人设：黄仁勋为何这么接地气
Nvidia帝国缔造者的另一面：从晚宴到街头面档

priority.full_text:
Today we're launching Paxel: a free tool that analyzes your Claude, Codex, and Cursor coding sessions and gives you a profile of how you build with AI.

It runs locally inside Docker, and your code never leaves your machine.

Try it at https://t.co/HqSHneQSTQ https://t.co/ykmg52NLDR
priority.summary: Y Combinator推出Paxel工具，免费分析Claude/Codex/Cursor编程会话，本地运行保护隐私。开发者工具，受众垂直。
angles: Y Combinator发布编程分析神器，Claude/Cursor用户必装
代码永不上云：本地隐私分析工具Paxel免费开放
3款AI编辑器对标工具，看你的编程风格画像

priority.full_text:
Stumbled upon a Codex skill that creates cool illustrations to explain topics or tell stories.

You feed it text (blog, article, narrative, even code) and it makes explainer graphics with this cute blob character.

I gave it the repo for the X recommendation algo and got this 👇 https://t.co/ATB7A05YxA
priority.summary: Codex技能演示：输入文本自动生成可视化解释图表，用X推荐算法repo测试效果。AI设计工具应用展示。
angles: Codex隐藏技能：文字秒变可视化解释图，萌系blob角色
AI绘图新玩法：用Codex把代码变成故事插画
从文章到图表：Codex自动生成讲解漫画的黑科技
